He would also increase the death tax from 16% to 50%.

No other jurisdiction in the USA confiscates wealth at death from people with that small of an estate. Anyone with any equity in a home in NYC would likely exceed the $750,000 and have to pay the death tax.

🚨🇮🇷 4 days after his appointment, the world finally got Iran's new supreme leader Mojtaba Khamenei's first message.

But he didn't appear on video or release audio. Just a lengthy written statement that was read out on state TV.

The message: he saw his father's dead body with "his fist clenched in what he said was a final sign of resistance." 

Demanded reparations from the U.S. Told Gulf states to shut down American bases, or they remain targets.

🚨 Charlie Cox says he was devastated when audiences barely reacted to his cameo in Spider-Man: No Way Home (2021).

He went to a theater in Connecticut to hear the crowd’s reaction when Matt Murdock appeared but the room was “dead f*cking quiet.”

Cox said only one person whispered, “Oh cool,” in a sea of silence.
